title: Mr. and Mrs. North
writer: S.K. Lauren, Owen Davis, Richard Lockridge
actors: Gracie Allen, William Post Jr., Paul Kelly
plot: Jerry North (William Post Jr.) and his wife, Pam (Gracie Allen) return home after a night away in a holiday spirit. That soon vanishes when the body of a man falls out of the liquor closet. The corpse is identified as Stanley Bren...
